flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Fort Lewis College fell 28% between 2021 and 2024 (29.6% → 21.3%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Fort Lewis College fell 19% between 2021 and 2024 (44.1% → 35.6%).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Fort Lewis College rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 ($9.0k → $10.0k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Fort Lewis College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (2.3% → 0.0%).
